offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 contracts/month, inefficient onboarding causes late order fulfillment. We streamline the onboarding process instead of manual tracking and email communication.
problem: Inefficient customer onboarding and contract management processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 Shopify store owners with demo video
Share insights in community forums for Shopify tools
try_it: Let users try Template-based contract generation and Email reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
